issues.detail: The skill file lacks at least two realistic demonstrations of usage.

scenarios.name: Set up a reliable local run flow for a Tuist menubar app
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses run-menubar.sh/stop-menubar.sh with TUIST_SKIP_UPDATE_CHECK=1 tuist xcodebuild build, tuist generate --no-open, LSUIElement=true, and avoids opening Xcode — baseline relies on raw xcodebuild and tuist run without restart logic.

scenarios.name: Refactor a menubar app whose UI freezes after API drift
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies the file-shape boundaries (*Model*/*Client*/*Store*/*View*), moves filtering into the @Observable store, relaxes decoding with optional fields and defaults, and runs the validation matrix; baseline patches the view layer directly without separating transport/state.
